principal_actions: Normalize/dedupe; assign owner; calculate rules score; create response task; send permitted acknowledgement.
mandatory_stops_or_evidence: Exit on duplicate/invalid/suppression; one acknowledgement per intake key.

principal_actions: Remind owner; escalate to manager; show exception; require disposition after breach.
mandatory_stops_or_evidence: Stops on meaningful human response, disqualification or conversion.

principal_actions: Create call/email tasks and bounded approved email steps.
mandatory_stops_or_evidence: Immediate stop on reply, opt-out, complaint, stage change, manual hold or cap.

trigger: No meaningful activity by state threshold
principal_actions: Refresh score; create next-action task; escalate; require nurture/pause/disqualify/continue decision.
mandatory_stops_or_evidence: No automatic disqualification; closes when owner records decision.

principal_actions: Re-check consent/fit; create owner review; optional approved low-frequency message.
mandatory_stops_or_evidence: Stops on reply, DNC, invalid contact or renewed active qualification.

principal_actions: Create merge-review recommendation with matched fields and risk.
mandatory_stops_or_evidence: Never auto-merges; closes on accept/reject/not-duplicate.

trigger: Stage entry plus no activity/overdue next action
principal_actions: Warn owner; recalculate risk; recommend next action; escalate slipped dates.
mandatory_stops_or_evidence: Stops on valid transition, completed action, approved pause or closure.

principal_actions: Route reviewer; lock snapshot; generate document; create send draft; issue after guards.
mandatory_stops_or_evidence: Material edit invalidates approval; one issued event per version.

principal_actions: Notify owner; create follow-up; optionally send approved reminder; mark expired at deadline.
mandatory_stops_or_evidence: Stops on acceptance, rejection, reply, replacement, closure or suppression.

principal_actions: Freeze outcome; create/link customer, onboarding and renewal; assign owners; create welcome draft and handoff checklist.
mandatory_stops_or_evidence: Atomic/idempotent; incomplete handoff blocks customer launch.

principal_actions: Stop sales sequence; capture reason; schedule eligible feedback; set reconsideration date.
mandatory_stops_or_evidence: No feedback when consent/fatigue/policy disallows; reply routes to owner.

principal_actions: Instantiate template; assign tasks; send welcome; request required information; set milestones.
mandatory_stops_or_evidence: One case per handoff; pauses on commercial/security hold.

principal_actions: Send bounded reminders; notify owner; escalate blocker after threshold.
mandatory_stops_or_evidence: Stops on submission, reply, waiver, case pause/completion or cap.

principal_actions: Create blocker action; notify owners/managers; update health reason; send approved delay update.
mandatory_stops_or_evidence: Closes only with resolution/accepted exception and next plan.

principal_actions: Complete case; create success baseline; send completion note; schedule feedback/review.
mandatory_stops_or_evidence: Low feedback branches to recovery and suppresses advocacy.

principal_actions: Dedupe; link customer; acknowledge; classify/suggest priority; assign queue; start SLA.
mandatory_stops_or_evidence: Acknowledgement never stops human first-response clock.

principal_actions: Notify owner; escalate by severity; create exception; require breach reason/corrective action.
mandatory_stops_or_evidence: Stops warning after compliant action; breach evidence remains immutable.

principal_actions: Schedule reminder(s); wake owner; close only under approved inactivity policy.
mandatory_stops_or_evidence: Reply immediately reopens/in-progress; no silent close after complaint.

trigger: Ticket resolved / customer replies / validation window ends
principal_actions: Send resolution; schedule CSAT; reopen on unresolved reply; close after policy.
mandatory_stops_or_evidence: One CSAT per resolution interval; fatigue and suppression checked.

trigger: Low survey score or severe complaint intent
principal_actions: Open recovery; assign senior owner; hold promotional/advocacy; require contact and outcome.
mandatory_stops_or_evidence: Hold ends only on documented recovery/authorized timed override.

trigger: Health band worsens or critical reason appears
principal_actions: Notify success owner; create/update plan; surface evidence; set review cadence.
mandatory_stops_or_evidence: No repeated duplicate plan; closes when risk resolved/accepted.

principal_actions: Verify active obligations/consent; create personal check-in task; suggest approved draft.
mandatory_stops_or_evidence: Automated sends alone do not reset timer; no forced contact under DNC.

principal_actions: Create preparation tasks; compile issues/health; branch healthy vs at-risk; schedule reviews and controlled reminders.
mandatory_stops_or_evidence: One sequence per renewal cycle; at-risk branch suppresses generic ask.

trigger: Customer marked churned / cooling period reached
principal_actions: Stop active success workflows; capture reason; complete obligations; later assess win-back eligibility.
mandatory_stops_or_evidence: Win-back requires permission, owner and explicit eligibility; stops on reply/opt-out.

trigger: Validated positive feedback plus healthy relationship
principal_actions: Create staff recommendation for review/referral request with evidence.
mandatory_stops_or_evidence: Never auto-sends; suppressed by active risk, recent ask or fatigue.

trigger: IMAP/SMTP failure, bounce or stale heartbeat
principal_actions: Retry transient errors; suppress hard bounce; create admin/customer-data tasks; alert on mailbox outage.
mandatory_stops_or_evidence: No uncontrolled retries; secrets excluded from logs.

trigger: Dead letter, queue age, DB/storage threshold or invariant violation
principal_actions: Create severity incident; assign owner; stop risky jobs/features; support replay/repair.
mandatory_stops_or_evidence: Release block at critical capacity; resolution requires evidence.

trigger: Daily/weekly schedule and model review date
principal_actions: Send scoped action digest; aggregate KPIs; evaluate model drift/outcomes; create review task.
mandatory_stops_or_evidence: No sensitive details in subject; candidate models never auto-promote.
